documentationPolicy.indexPurpose: Targeted documentation lookup without loading whole wiki pages
documentationPolicy.secretPolicy: No passwords, tokens, internal addresses, usernames, or secret-file paths

documents.summary: Canonical private Wiki.js project page with verified implementation status and security/deployment overview.
Verified implementation plan: Unraid/Dockhand, writable libraries, OIDC, MariaDB/SQLite, WebGL viewer, i18n and slicer helper.
Dockhand deployment, external web_net, reverse proxy and DNS procedure.
Scanning, backups, restore, cleanup and diagnostics runbook.
OIDC roles, filesystem boundaries, audit events and secret handling.
Local native-slicer helper protocol and cross-platform installation.
